series_metadata.series_description: Contains complaint and investigative correspond- ence related to complaint resolution. Complaints are filed by individuals against either agents or insurance companies.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: In office 2 years after end of calendar year in which complaint or violation is disposed; then erase ; Paper: In office 2 years after end of calendar year in which complaint or violation is disposed; then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
